description: OP-CAP-11I plain-text purchase-order source fixture standing in for a PDF upload. Deterministic, fake, non-production. No binary PDF is loaded; this is the textual content a demo PDF would carry. Used to script the PDF_PO_EXCEPTION scenario: one ambiguous SKU line and one unsupported unit-of-measure line must raise validation exceptions for operator review.

lines.rawDescription: Toyota Camry 2018 OEM front brake pad set

expectedExceptions: Line 2 raises an ambiguous-SKU validation exception ('CAMRY PADS' has no single confident match).
Line 3 raises an unsupported unit-of-measure validation exception ('BX' is not a recognized UOM).
expectedHandling: Both exception lines route to operator review; the draft cannot advance until resolved; no auto-approval and no external write.
